full_description: FocusFlow is a productivity app that helps users stay focused on tasks with the Pomodoro technique and customizable schedules. The Pomodoro technique is a time management method that uses a timer to break down work into intervals, traditionally 25 minutes, separated by short breaks. This technique can help you stay focused and avoid burnout. With FocusFlow, you can customize the length of your work intervals and breaks to fit your needs. You can also schedule your tasks in advance and set reminders to ensure you stay on track. Additionally, FocusFlow provides statistics on your productivity, allowing you to identify areas for improvement and optimize your workflow. Whether you're a student, professional, or entrepreneur, FocusFlow can help you achieve your goals and increase your productivity.
